constants.name: UNMAPPED_STATION_ID
constants.description: Identifier used when a station id has no mapped stop code or location.

constants.name: DEPARTURE_LOCATION_OVERWRITE
constants.description: Overrides default station latitude/longitude for specific stop codes when departing (non-arrival events).

constants.name: STATION_ID_TO_STOP_CODE_MAP
constants.description: Mapping from R9K numeric station identifiers to GTFS stop codes used for event location resolution.

constants.name: r9kDateFormat
constants.description: Date format string used to parse R9K createdDate values.

constants.name: maxMessageDelay
constants.description: Upper bound in seconds for allowable message delay before marking as outdated.

constants.name: minMessageDelay
constants.description: Lower bound in seconds for allowable message delay before marking as wrong time.

constants.name: rootElement
constants.description: Root XML element name expected in incoming R9K messages.

constants.name: xmlOptions
constants.description: XML parsing configuration specifying array path for train change elements.

constants.name: filterStations
constants.description: List of station ids (as strings) used to determine relevance of R9K updates.

functions.name: deserializeAndValidate
functions.description: Parses an XML message into a typed Message and applies sequential validations on structure and timing, throwing ValidationError on failures.
functions.outputs: Validated Message object or thrown ValidationError
errors: Received invalid message, reason: outdated, delay in seconds: ${messageDelay} ${messageStr}
Received invalid message, reason: wrong time, delay in seconds: ${messageDelay} ${messageStr}
rules: Message must contain at least one change entry
Event seconds must be derived from actual departure or arrival when available
Event seconds must be greater than zero
Computed message delay must not exceed maxMessageDelay
Computed message delay must not be less than minMessageDelay

mappings.description: Map parsed XML root element to typed Message instance
Select first change entry for timing evaluation

transformations: XML string converted to JS object then to typed Message
Derive eventSeconds from actual departure or arrival time
Construct ValidationError messages with reason and original message string
calculations: eventSeconds selection based on departed/arrived flags

functions.name: convert
functions.description: Transforms a TrainUpdate into an array of SmarTrakEvent objects, filtering irrelevant updates, validating station relevance, resolving vehicles, and applying location overrides.
rules: Ignore updates with a single non-progress change (MovementType.OTHER)
Require station info present and relevant
Use departure location overwrite for non-arrival movement if available
Generate one event per allocated vehicle

mappings.description: Map station id to stop code for stop lookup
Resolve vehicles for train update via external ref id
Map each resolved vehicle label to constructed event
Select final event location based on movement type and override availability

transformations: Construct SmarTrakEvent objects from vehicle labels and location data
filters: Exclude updates with irrelevant movement type
Exclude updates with station not in filterStations

functions.name: isR9KRelevantStation
functions.description: Determines if a station is relevant by checking if its stop_code matches any mapped filter station id.
rules: Station relevance determined by presence of its stop_code in mapped filterStations list

decision_points.outcome: return true or false based on match

mappings.description: Convert filter station id to number and map to stop code for comparison

filters: Match predicate filters station list against provided stop_code

functions.name: getMovementType
functions.description: Maps a ChangeType numeric value to a MovementType classification for arrival, departure, prediction, or other.
rules: Certain change types classify as ARRIVAL
Departure-related change types classify as DEPARTURE
ScheduleChange classifies as PREDICTION
Unmatched types classify as OTHER

mappings.description: Switch-case mapping of change types to movement categories

functions.name: toSmartrakEvent
functions.description: Creates a SmarTrakEvent object from a vehicle label, station coordinates, and creation date with normalized fields.
functions.inputs: vehicleLabel: string, station: { stop_lat: number, stop_lon: number }, trainUpdateCreationDate: string
rules: External ID derived from vehicle label with spaces removed
Location data uses provided station coordinates
ReceivedAt parsed from creation date with configured format
transformations: Instantiate SmarTrakEvent and nested data objects

functions.name: ChangeTypeConverter.serialize
functions.description: Converts a ChangeType enum value to a numeric representation.
rules: Force enum to number using valueOf then Number()

functions.name: ChangeTypeConverter.deserialize
functions.description: Converts a numeric value to a ChangeType enum (by numeric casting).
rules: Return numeric value cast as ChangeType

functions.name: BooleanConverter.serialize
functions.description: Serializes a boolean to a string 'true' or 'false'.
rules: Map true to 'true' and false to 'false'

functions.name: BooleanConverter.deserialize
functions.description: Deserializes a string to a boolean by strict equality with 'true'.
rules: Return true only when value equals 'true'

functions.name: NumberConverter.serialize
functions.description: Serializes a number to its string representation.
rules: Convert number to string via String()

functions.name: NumberConverter.deserialize
functions.description: Deserializes a string to a number using Number().
rules: Convert string to number via Number()

functions.name: twoTap
functions.description: Applies two sequential timestamp advancements (each +5 seconds) to an event and publishes after each delay.
rules: Wait fixed delay before each timestamp adjustment and publish
Add 5 seconds twice to original timestamp
transformations: Update event.messageData.timestamp by adding FIVE_SEC_DELAY twice
